channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jaguars hire Vikings assistant Grant Udinski, 29, as offensive coordinator
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars are assembling one of the NFL’s youngest coaching staffs. Head coach Liam Coen, 39, hired Minnesota assistant Grant Udinski as his offensive coordinator late Wednesday, although Coen plans to call plays during his Jaguars tenure.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jimmy Butler is headed to the Golden State Warriors, Andrew Wiggins to Miami Heat, AP source says
item.description: Jimmy Butler got what he wanted. He's being traded out of Miami and got a new contract in the process. The Heat and the Golden State Warriors have agreed on a deal that sends Butler to the Bay Area, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers land center Mark Williams in trade with Hornets for Knecht and Reddish, AP source says
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Lakers are acquiring center Mark Williams from the Charlotte Hornets in a trade for rookie Dalton Knecht, Cam Reddish and draft considerations, a person with knowledge of the deal tells The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM and STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scores 50 points as NBA-leading Thunder rout Suns 140-109
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 50 points and the NBA-leading Oklahoma City Thunder routed the Phoenix Suns 140-109 on Wednesday night to improve to 40-9.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox enjoys successful debut with Spurs as Wembanyama's point guard in win over Hawks
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — De'Aaron Fox had a quick description of his first game as the point guard for 7-foot-3 Victor Wembanyama. “He is different,” Fox said. “He is special. Just the type of defensive attention he receives allows you to do things you don't normally do.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Falcons' Michael Penix Jr shares crucial advice Kirk Cousins gave him after taking over as starter
item.description: Michael Penix Jr. shared the crucial piece of advice he learned from his Atlanta Falcons teammate Kirk Cousins as he took over the starting quarterback position.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams headed Down Under for NFL's 1st game in Australia
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) — The Los Angeles Rams are set to make NFL history Down Under next year. The squad announced Wednesday that they're headed to Melbourne, Australia, in 2026 to play the league's first regular season game in the country.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Jets stars share lessons learned through adversity from rollercoaster 2024 season
item.description: New York Jets star defenders Jermaine Johnson and Quincy Williams may have had a tumultuous 2024 season, but they shared the valuable lessons they learned through adversity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: George Kittle recipient of NFL's Salute to Service Award amid $250K in donations to military nonprofits
item.description: San Francisco 49ers tight end George Kittle has been announced as the recipient of the National Football League's 14th Salute to Service Award.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 70 Illinois residents can win Las Vegas vacation with Rosati's Pizza
item.description: Illinois residents can enter the Rosati's Pizza sweepstakes and win a three-day, two-night vacation at the Circa Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, with the contest closing on the day of the Big Game.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NFL stops 'End Racism' message in Super Bowl end zone: Report
item.description: The end zones will include the phrases "Choose Love" and "It Takes All of Us" for the game at the Caesars Superdome.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers legend Steve Young believes football was made for girls
item.description: ATHERTON, Calif. - Steve Young is fully invested in one of Silicon Valley's newest startups - girls flag football. Whether it's the size of the field. "The front line you don't see. You see the cone here? Every first down is a cone." The size of the ball.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Influencers, retired Bay Area sports stars headline NBA All-Star Celebrity Game in Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA released the list of celebrities that will take the floor in Oakland for the NBA All-Star Celebrity Game on Feb. 14. A combination of influencers, retired athletes, film stars and more will put their basketball skills to test.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah loses fifth straight in another close game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has been in nearly every game the last couple weeks, but have not been able to close teams out. Jordan Kyrou broke a tie in the third period to help the St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jey Uso set to headline WrestleMania Vegas as outrage over Royal Rumble divides fans
item.description: Jey Uso won the 2025 over-the-top-rope battle royal, featuring 30 wrestlers in what may have been one of the most stacked Royal Rumble matches ever.
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Americans to spend 22% more on the Super Bowl this year: Survey
item.description: The LendingTree 2025 Super Bowl Spending Report survey covers everything from food and fan merch to sports betting.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: NBA shocker: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic led Dallas to the NBA Finals last season. Anthony Davis won a championship with the Los Angeles Lakers. They're switching teams now — in an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Where to watch Super Bowl LIX in San Diego
item.description: Football fans who want to participate in the excitement of Super Bowl LIX without traveling to New Orleans or watching from their living room can watch the big game at several venues in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Padres FanFest returns to Petco Park: what to know before you go
item.description: It's that time of year again: Padres FanFest is back and is expected to be bigger than ever, according to a spokesperson with the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Grand Valley Climbing Gym to host climbing competition
item.description: Zangrilli states, “The coolest thing for us is watching kids that come to us join our program, who have zero climbing experience, very quickly, find a really nice core group of kids on the team, and through that team community, they start to thrive.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Kawamoto, KREX 5

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ha-Seong Kim agrees to 2-year deal worth $29 million with Rays, AP source says
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays and free agent Ha-Seong Kim have agreed to a two-year contract valued at $29 million, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Porzingis hits eight 3s, scores 34 as Bulls open 3-game road trip with blowout loss in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Kristaps Porzingis scored 26 of his season-high 34 points in the first half Wednesday night, and the Boston Celtics coasted to a 122-100 victory over the Bulls in the first game of Chicago's three-game road trip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
